title: Remove (hide) New Item link
excerpt: Could Monday.com add functionality to hide the ‘New Item’ options from a board? We have our boards set up that all new items are filtered through one board and then connections are utilized to create new items.  I don’t …

posts.author: Chrystle (Chrystle)
posts.cookedHtml: Could Monday.com add functionality to hide the ‘New Item’ options from a board? We have our boards set up that all new items are filtered through one board and then connections are utilized to create new items. I don’t want people to accidently create a new item on the wrong board.
